title: elho June Round High 40 - Plant Pot for Indoor & Outdoor - 100% Recycled Plastic - Ø 39.0 x H 70.1 cm - Beige/Balanced Beige
features: TIMELESS DESIGN | Its soft rounded shape makes this flowerpot stand out perfectly in almost any interior.
DIMENSIONS | Inner diameter: 32,2 cm – Outer diameter: 39 cm. Ideal for medium-sized plants and small trees.
INDOOR AND OUTDOOR | This beautiful designer plant pot is a true eye-catcher for your home interior, garden, or terrace.
LIFETIME WARRANTY | The plastic used for the pot is of high quality. This allows it to stand in full sun without the colours fading. This pot can even withstand temperatures as low as -40 degrees.
RECYCLED PLASTIC | The plant pot is made of 100% recycled plastic and is 100% recyclable.
